message:
feat(cli): add UBS bug notification commands and dashboard integration (ntm-q5mj)

This implements the UBS Agent Notifications feature with:

**New CLI Commands (internal/cli/bugs.go)**
- `ntm bugs list [path]` - List scan findings with filtering:
  - Filter by severity (--severity=critical|warning|info)
  - Limit results (--limit=N, default 20)
  - Show all including info (--all)
  - JSON output (--json) for automation
- `ntm bugs notify [path]` - Send findings to agents via Agent Mail:
  - Targets agents by their file reservations
  - Only notifies on critical/warning findings
  - Dry-run mode (--dry-run) to preview
- `ntm bugs summary [path]` - Display bug count summary

**Dashboard Integration**
- Added bug counts to ticker panel (TickerData struct):
  - BugsCritical, BugsWarning, BugsInfo, BugsScanned fields
- New "Bugs:" segment in ticker display with Peach-colored label
- Model struct extended with bug tracking fields

**Scan Result Caching**
- Results cached in .ntm/scan_cache.json for 1 hour
- Handles both file and directory paths correctly

The core notification logic leveraging Agent Mail reservations was already
implemented in internal/scanner/notify.go - this work adds the CLI interface
and TUI integration.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1247,6 +1247,7 @@ func init() {
 		newDepsCmd(),
 		newKillCmd(),
 		newScanCmd(),
+		newBugsCmd(),
 		newCassCmd(),
 		newHooksCmd(),
 		newHealthCmd(),

@@ -335,6 +335,12 @@ type Model struct {
 	fetchingCheckpoint  bool
 	checkpointError     error
 
+	// UBS bug scanner status
+	bugsCritical int  // Critical bugs from last scan
+	bugsWarning  int  // Warning bugs from last scan
+	bugsInfo     int  // Info bugs from last scan
+	bugsScanned  bool // Whether a scan has been run
+
 	// Error tracking for data sources (displayed as badges)
 	beadsError       error
 	alertsError      error
@@ -1923,6 +1929,10 @@ func (m *Model) updateTickerData() {
 		MailConnected:    m.agentMailConnected,
 		CheckpointCount:  m.checkpointCount,
 		CheckpointStatus: m.checkpointStatus,
+		BugsCritical:     m.bugsCritical,
+		BugsWarning:      m.bugsWarning,
+		BugsInfo:         m.bugsInfo,
+		BugsScanned:      m.bugsScanned,
 	}
 
 	m.tickerPanel.SetData(data)
